summary: Adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() to backup existing files before overwrite

fields.summary: Adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() to backup existing files before overwrite

content:
type: INTENT
files: src/PIL/Image.py (Image.save method, ~line 2469-2591), Tests/test_image.py (TestImage class, near test_string ~line 178)
summary: Added backup=False/backup_suffix='.bak' params to save(); popped alongside save_all before encoderinfo merge (~line 2546-2548), backup copy made via shutil.copy2 inside 'if open_fp:' block right after computing 'created' (~line 2561-2568), only when file already existed. Added shutil import. Should not conflict with dry_run's in-memory-buffer guard as long as your guard wraps the builtins.open() calls; my backup copy happens before those opens. Let me know if you want me to adjust ordering.
